channel.title: GitHub Logos Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Logos in GitHub

item.title: YTLitePlus/YTLitePlus
item.description: A modified version of Youtube for iOS supercharged with YTLite (by @dayanch96) and +20 tweaks

item.title: TherionRO/YouTubeiVanced
item.description: iVanced for YouTube is a modded application for iPhone user with or without jailbreak. iVanced supports adblocking,dislikes,skip sponsors (iSponsorBlock) and many more customizations and features!The app is also 100% free.

item.title: arichornlover/YouTubeRebornPlus
item.description: LillieH1000’s YouTube Reborn but with even more features!
